name: example_feature
title: Add pull-to-refresh on feed
acceptanceCriteria: Feed data refreshes when user pulls down
Items list updates after refresh completes

name: ios-build-strategy
title: iOS build strategy for large Tuist monorepos
acceptanceCriteria: resolve strategy validates dependencies without full compilation
tuist strategy runs tuist build for Tuist modules
auto strategy falls back from tuist to xcodebuild to resolve
xcodebuild strategy works for standalone non-Tuist modules
repository setup preserves GitHub origin and Tuist cache
mutation score for touched files is at least 80%
